definitions.text: A communication, or what is communicated; any concept or information conveyed.
examples: We've just received an urgent message from the President.
He received a message telling him to update his laptop.

definitions.text: An underlying theme or conclusion to be drawn from something.
examples: The main message of the novel is that time heals all wounds.

definitions.text: To send a message to; to transmit a message to, e.g. as text via a cell phone.
examples: I messaged her about the concert.

definitions.text: To send (something) as a message; usually refers to electronic messaging.
examples: She messaged me the information yesterday.
Please message the final report by fax.

definitions.text: To send a message or messages; to be capable of sending messages.
examples: We've implemented a new messaging service.
The runaway computer program was messaging non-stop.
